title: nepeta subincisa var. salangensis
intro: Nepeta subincisa var. salangensis, also known as Salang Nepeta, is a subspecies of the Nepeta subincisa plant, which is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Salang Nepeta include relief from digestive problems, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Salang Nepeta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in cooking and as a garnish, making it a versatile and useful medicinal herb.
